title: hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. wiesbaurianiforme
intro: Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. wiesbaurianiforme, also known as a lesser hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family that belongs to the genus Hieracium. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. wiesbaurianiforme include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which may be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
